name: team-task-manager
description: Full-stack team task manager with role-based access

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run db:generate --prefix server
scripts.start: npm run db:migrate && npm run start --prefix server
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
